WARNING: MacBook Air 13-inch M3 (X2818/MLB). NOT Pro, NOT M4.
extraction_notes: Complete extraction from all 121 pages. All vague names replaced with actual U-designators from schematic.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. M3 generation. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. Uses AWAKE naming (not MAME like M2).

ics.function: SVR AON - 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. F_SW register controlled at 1MHz. Main power IC feeding both PMUs. Two BOM options: 1-stage (30A, Irx=44A) or 2-stage (30+42A).
Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 5,6,8,10,12,13,14. LDOs: 4,9,9B,12,INT. Switches: SW4-7. NC LDOs: 6,15,17,16,18. Input: PP3V8_AON. SYM 3 OF 4.
Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0,1,2,3,4,7,9,11,13. LDOs: 2,7,8,9,9B,10,11,20,INT,RTC. Switches: SW1-3. NC LDOs: 1,3,5,14,16. 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON (VODMAN). SYM 5 OF 8.
Main charger IC converting USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. OKINTEGRATE marked. Multiple BOM options.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. F=1.5MHz, EDC=5.85A. Two BOM options: THINSTNC / THICKSTNC.
Produces PP3V3_S2 (3.3V) from PPBUS_AON. VOUT=3.3V, EDC=1.2A, F=1.3MHz. Also produces PP3V3_SW_LCD and PP3V3_S2_DEBUG.
Port controller for ATC0 (left rear). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control via DF400. Has internal LDO (PP3V3_UPCO_LDO, PP1V5_UPCO_LDO_CORE). Powered by PP5V_S2, PP1V25_S2, PPVBUS_USBC0.
Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same function as UF400 for second port.
Combined retimer and USB2 repeater for ATC0. Replaces separate re-timer + UF600 repeater from A2681. Powered by PP1V25_S2, PP1V8_S2, PP3V3_S2_100.
Combined retimer and USB2 repeater for ATC1. Same as UF600 for second port.
ACE3 MagSafe/USB-C port controller. Replaces AAROXA9PA0830 from A2681. Has internal LDOs: PP3V3_UPC5_LDO, PP1V5_UPC5_LDO_CORE. Extensive GPIO. OMIT_TABLE. IN PROGRESS marked.
Secure Element IC. Powered by VDDPL1_SE, PP3V8_AON.
Monitors PP3V8_AON current via sense resistors. Output to MPMU ADC.
Current limit comparator for 3V8 AON rail throttling. Connected to MONT_VDDMAIN_UVMON30.
Secondary current sense for 3V8 AON rail.
PPBUS voltage sense amplifier. Feeds MPMU ADC.
PP3V8_AON sense amplifier. PMU_PBUS.DEV dual function.
Buffers PP1V8_AON_MPMU clock signal to trackpad. BOM option for TPAD_32KCLK:YES.
Buffers CHGR_EN_MFR_1V8 to BMU_CRASH_L signal. OD buffer if input is 5V tolerant.
3.3V LDO producing PP3V3_S2_HOLD_IPD from PP1V8_AON. Current limit 350mA.
Load switch/e-fuse. 490mA current limit. RC delay 4.7ms.
Load switch/e-fuse for PPBUS to IPD. 3A current limit.
PP1V8 switched load switch.
IPD overcurrent/fault protection logic.
AND gate for IPD power enable gating.
Inverter in P5VS2 enable gating chain.
AND gate in P5VS2 enable gating chain.
5A current limit. Switches PPBUS_AON to PPBUS_AONSW_LCD for BEN backlight. RLIM = 3334/5A = 666.8 ohms.
Display and keyboard backlight boost converter. Input: PPBUS_S2 / PPBUS_AON. Outputs PPVOUT_LCDBKLT. Multiple LED string modes. Has PMOS_SAI, COMBO footprint. FP800 fuse on input.
Display power management IC. Outputs: PP_AVDD (default 4.85V), PP_VGH, PP_VGL, PP_VCOM. PMC I2C address 0x74 (0xE8/0xE9). TI vs Intersil BOM options. Has LR001 inductor.
Sequences display panel power rails. Controls PANEL_EN_OUT, PANEL_PWR_EN, MLC_LOGIC_EN, MLC_D1_IN, EDP_PANEL_DISCHARGE.
Panel power controller. LCD_PWR_EN input, controls PANEL_EN_IN, SYS_ALIVE. 7 NC outputs on this design.
Level shifts camera reset signal. Powered by PP1V25_S2, PP1V8_S2.
Ferrite bead filter: PP5V_S2 to PP5V_S2_CAMERA_FILT. CRITICAL component.
Willamette WiFi/BT module. Replaces Typhoon from A2681. With 2GFEM + 5GFEM front-ends (CL001-CL035). Powered by VBAT, PP3V8_AON_WLBT, PP1V25_S2.
First NAND package. S5E MK2 design. UN000/UN000 power ICs. PCIe AC caps critical.
Second NAND package. Same power as S5E0. UN100 power ICs.
Left speaker amplifiers. TAWANG B98 codec. Powered by PP3V8_AON (PVDD_SNSR), PPBUS_AON (PVDD). 6 amps total (A-F).
Right speaker amplifiers. Same TAWANG codec.
Sovereign IMU. Powered by PP1V8_S2 (via FLE400 filter). SPI interface.
Secure disable SAK with AMR+LAS. Powered by PP1V8_AON, PP1V25_S2. CRITICAL: SPI_LD_ORON_HW pin.
DMIC disable logic for SECDIS. Powered by PP1V25_S2.
USB-C ATC power sequencer. Controls VDDIO, VDD_FIXED, VDD_CIO timing. CRITICAL. 3.3V must be HIGH before VIN_LV of Aces.
USB-C ATC0/ATC1 voltage regulators. Vout=1.212V, IOUT max 1.5A, F=1.8MHz. Multiple inductor/cap stages.
Third USB-C regulator. Vout=0.872V, IOUT max 5.5A, F=1.8MHz.
Battery flex connector. Dual connector (J5150 + J5157). SYS_DETECT circuit with D5100/Q5100/Q5190.
MagSafe connector with D5401 diode + D5402/D5403 ESD protection. Mates with APN: 516S00788.
Debug connector for USB-C and MagSafe signals. BOM option USBC_DBG.
Level shifter for display TCON UART interface. Powered by PP1V25_AWAKE_3D.
